name: DNA巴黎设计奖
home_text:
DNA Paris Design Awards
A FRESH DESIGN
2026 COMPETITION IS NOW OPEN !
Regular deadline : 8th May 2026
Enter here.
WHO IS IT FOR ?
You’re a designer with a recent piece of work that touches on at least one of these disciplines : architecture, interior, landscape, product, graphic.
Your work stands out, it makes an impact, and deserves international exposure.
You’re interested in getting feedback and connecting with the brightest design minds in the industry.
HOW DOES THAT WORK ?
Submit your work online, whether you’re from France, or any part of the world.
Results will be announced at the beginning of July and the Awards Ceremony will happened in Paris on October 2026.
If you win one of the 5 main categories, you’ll be a DNA Designer Of The Year !
If you win any sub-categories, you’ll be a DNA Winner and will get a DNA Award to crown you !
CATEGORIES
Architecture
Interior
Landscape
Product
Graphic
THE FEE ?
From 60 to 350€ per entry, DNA Paris Design Award is open to professionals and students.
This year you can submit your projects until May 8th 2026 (late deadline until May 22nd).
More info here.
AND THE BENEFITS !
By entering DNA Paris Design Award, you’ll get :
Access to the Summer Design Conference events in Paris
Invitation for 2 people to the Gala night in Paris for winners
Network, press coverage and fame !
More benefits here.
